headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -0.3)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 62% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly increased (z=2.48)
sentiment_commentary:
• Fears dominate despite negative scoring, with 51 quotes including 9 at strong intensity - people are expressing significant concerns today.
• Fear levels dropped from yesterday but remain well within the typical range for this period.
• Frustrations plummeted sharply from yesterday's high of 107.1 to just 7.0, while optimism improved slightly but stays in negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
